3007737.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3007737.description: When Po is possessed by the ghost of evil Master Ding, it's up to Tigress to save him before Ding can unleash his powers and enslave the Valley of Peace.

3048939.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3048939.description: Tigress is forced to babysit a small child who has been separated from his parents.

3067813.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3067813.description: Po and Mantis visit the equivalent of an ancient Chinese Comic-Con, where Po's fanboy enthusiasm gets out of hand.

3086192.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3086192.description: Po's visit to a famous war hero goes awry when he finds out the retired general is off his rocker.
